labels.name: push_file
labels.description: Create or update a single file on a given branch in a GitHub repository. REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN with contents write access.

labels.name: list_pulls
labels.description: List pull requests for a GitHub repository. REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN.

labels.name: list_branches
labels.description: List or resolve branch names. **List mode (default):** one `GET /repos/.../branches?per_page=100&page=1` — at most 100 names, A–Z sorted in the response; `has_more` if a full page was returned. **Resolve mode:** set `branch_name` for a single `GET` branch (404 if missing). At most one GitHub API cal

labels.name: list_issues
labels.description: List issues for a repository (excludes pull requests). REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN.

labels.name: create_issue
labels.description: Create an issue in a GitHub repository. REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN with issues write if creating issues in private repos.

labels.name: get_issue_comments
labels.description: List comments on an issue by issue number. REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN.

labels.name: get_pull_comments
labels.description: Get all pull request comments: both issue/PR thread comments and inline review comments, with a `type` of `issue_thread` or `review` per item. REQUIRES: `Github-Token` (HTTP) or GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN.

labels.name: generate_ticket_dependency_tree
labels.description: Generate a Mermaid flowchart that visualises Jira issue dependency links for a project. Each node shows the ticket key, summary, and status, and is a clickable link to the ticket. Dashed nodes represent issues linked from outside the current filter set.

labels.name: generate_jira_kanban_board
labels.description: Generate a Mermaid kanban board from Jira issues. Issues are grouped into columns by their current status and ordered by workflow stage (To Do → In Progress → Done). Each card shows the issue summary and is a clickable link to the ticket, with optional assignee and priority badges.

labels.name: generate_ticket_diagram
labels.description: Generate a Mermaid flowchart centred on a single Jira ticket. Fetches the ticket's subtasks, parent, issue links, and recent comments in one call. The focal ticket is highlighted in indigo; subtasks are grouped in a subgraph; issue links use colour-coded arrows (red thick = blocks, cyan dashed = rel

labels.name: generate_ticket_timeline
labels.description:
Generate a Mermaid diagram showing the history of a single Jira ticket using its changelog. Two views are available:
- **state**: stateDiagram-v2 showing all status transitions with dates and authors, nodes coloured by status category.
- **timeline** (default): Mermaid timeline grouped by month, sho

labels.name: get_notion_page_mermaid_diagrams
labels.description: Extract all Mermaid code blocks from a Notion page. Returns block ID, diagram code, and optional caption for each block.

labels.name: get_notion_mermaid_diagram_by_block_id
labels.description: Retrieve a single Mermaid diagram block by its block ID. Returns the diagram code and optional caption.

labels.name: update_notion_mermaid_diagram
labels.description: Update the Mermaid source code (and optional caption) of an existing mermaid code block by its block ID.

labels.name: insert_notion_mermaid_diagram
labels.description: Append a Mermaid diagram as a code block to a Notion page. The block is added at the end of the page content.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_pr, list_pulls, list_issues, get_issue_comments, get_pull_comments · Private data: get_mermaid_syntax_document, list_repos, list_mermaid_files, read_mermaid_file, create_pr, push_file, list_pulls, list_branches, list_issues, create_issue, get_issue_comments, get_pull_comments · Public sink: create_pr, create_issue · Destructive: search_mermaid_icons.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_pr, list_pulls, list_issues, get_issue_comments, get_pull_comments · Private data: get_mermaid_syntax_document, list_repos, list_mermaid_files, read_mermaid_file, create_pr, push_file, list_pulls, list_branches, list_issues, create_issue, get_issue_comments, get_pull_comments · Public sink: create_pr, create_issue · Destructive: search_mermaid_icons

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
